_comment: 2026-06-08: FancyYou migrated off Empretienda onto WooCommerce/WordPress (Elementor archive). Old selectors (div.product-list__item, .ek-img, /categoria/, /images/product_image/) are dead and produced 404 image URLs. Rewritten against the current Elementor WooCommerce DOM: card=div.product, title=h2.woocommerce-loop-product__title, price=span.price, image=img.attachment-woocommerce_thumbnail srcset (wp-content), pagination=a.next.page-numbers, categories=/product-category/.

args: --user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/114.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

pre_actions.script: (() => { const imgs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img')); imgs.forEach(img => { const ds = img.getAttribute('data-srcset') || img.getAttribute('data-lazy-srcset'); if (ds && (!img.getAttribute('srcset') || img.getAttribute('srcset').startsWith('data:'))) { img.setAttribute('srcset', ds); } const s = img.getAttribute('data-src') || img.getAttribute('data-lazy-src'); const cur = img.getAttribute('src'); if (s && (!cur || cur.startsWith('data:') || cur === '')) { img.setAttribute('src', s); } }); })();

fields.name: price
fields.transform: if (!data) return null; const m = String(data).match(/[\d\.]+/g); if (!m || !m.length) return null; return m[m.length - 1].replace(/\./g, '');

fields.name: image_primary
fields.transform: const toAbsolute = url => { if (!url) return null; const trimmed = url.trim(); if (!trimmed) return null; if (/^https?:/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed; if (trimmed.startsWith('//')) return 'https:' + trimmed; if (trimmed.startsWith('/')) return 'https://fancyyou.com.ar' + trimmed; return trimmed; }; const entryValue = entry => { if (!entry) return 0; const widthMatch = entry.match(/(\d+)\s*w/); if (widthMatch) return parseInt(widthMatch[1], 10); const densityMatch = entry.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*x/); if (densityMatch) return parseFloat(densityMatch[1]) * 1000; return 0; }; const pickFromSrcset = raw => { const entries = raw.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean); if (!entries.length) return null; const best = entries.reduce((winner, current) => entryValue(current) > entryValue(winner) ? current : winner); return toAbsolute(best.split(' ')[0]); }; const firstAvailable = sources => { for (const source of sources) { if (source && source.trim && source.trim()) return source.trim(); } return null; }; const attr = name => element ? element.getAttribute(name) : null; const datasetVal = name => element && element.dataset ? element.dataset[name] : null; let source = data && data.trim ? data.trim() : null; if (!source) { source = firstAvailable([attr('data-srcset'), attr('data-lazy-srcset'), datasetVal('srcset'), datasetVal('lazySrcset')]); } if (!source) { source = firstAvailable([attr('srcset')]); } if (!source) { source = firstAvailable([attr('src'), attr('data-src'), attr('data-lazy-src'), datasetVal('src'), datasetVal('lazySrc')]); } let result = null; if (source) { result = source.includes(',') ? pickFromSrcset(source) : toAbsolute(source.split(' ')[0]); } return result && !result.startsWith('data:image') && !result.includes('%3Csvg') ? result : null;

fields.name: url
fields.transform: if (!data) return null; return data.startsWith('/') ? 'https://fancyyou.com.ar' + data : data.split('?')[0];
